a.xlink:title: Searches for a printing that matches a given providerId.
Converts a CardRef into an ExactCard.
Retrieves a specific printing referenced by CardRef.
Attempts a more flexible card lookup using both simple name matching and CardRef rules.
Adds a card using the preferred printing if available.
Returns a printing of a card from the same set as another given printing when possible.
Syncs the contents of the child widgets with the current deck.
Reloads the deck if the file's last modified time has increased since we last checked.
Returns the preferred printing for the given card.
Resolves the complete display name of a card.
